---
title: "Brazil / Europe ANS Performance"
subtitle: "DECEA · EUROCONTROL · PBWG · 2019–2025"
format:
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: https://github.com/benevidesjpcb/Dashboard_BRA_EUR
    scrolling: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
source("_chapter-setup.R")
```

# Overview

## Row {height=18%}

```{r kpi-bra}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Brazil 2025 – Controlled Flights"
bra25 <- traffic_annual |> filter(REG == "BRA", year == this_year)
list(value = paste0(bra25$total_M, " M"), icon = "airplane", color = bra_col)
```

```{r kpi-eur}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Europe 2025 – Controlled Flights"
eur25 <- traffic_annual |> filter(REG == "EUR", year == this_year)
list(value = paste0(eur25$total_M, " M"), icon = "globe", color = eur_col)
```

```{r kpi-ratio}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "EUR / BRA Traffic Ratio 2025"
list(value = paste0(round(eur25$total_M / bra25$total_M, 1), "×"),
     icon = "bar-chart", color = "#6c757d")
```

```{r kpi-apt}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Study Airports"
list(value = paste0(length(bra_apts), " + ", length(eur_apts)),
     icon = "pin-map", color = "#495057")
```

## Row {height=82%}

### Col {width=60%}

```{r ov-traffic}
#| title: "Daily Traffic – 7-day Rolling Average (2023–2025)"
d <- traffic_daily |>
  filter(!is.na(roll7)) |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~DATE, y = ~roll7, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
        hovertemplate = "%{x|%b %Y}<br>%{y:,.0f} flights<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = ""),
         yaxis = list(title = "Flights / day (7-day avg)", tickformat = ","),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15),
         hovermode = "x unified")
```

### Col {width=40%}

```{r ov-daio}
#| title: "2025 Flight Distribution by Operation Type"
plot_ly(daio, x = ~pct, y = ~region, color = ~type,
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = "Share (%)"),
         yaxis = list(title = ""),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

# Traffic

## Row {height=65%}

```{r tr-daily}
#| title: "Daily Flights – Brazil vs Europe (2023–2025)"
d <- traffic_daily |>
  filter(!is.na(roll7)) |>
  mutate(region = recode(REG, BRA = "Brazil", EUR = "Europe"))

plot_ly(d, x = ~DATE, y = ~roll7, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines",
        hovertemplate = "%{x|%d %b %Y}<br>%{y:,.0f} flights<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", rangeslider = list(visible = TRUE)),
         yaxis = list(title = "Daily flights (7-day avg)", tickformat = ","),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2),
         hovermode = "x unified")
```

## Row {height=35%}

```{r tr-annual}
#| title: "Annual Totals"
traffic_annual |>
  select(Region = region, Year = year, `Total Flights` = total, `Million` = total_M) |>
  arrange(Region, Year) |>
  datatable(options = list(pageLength = 8, dom = "tip"), rownames = FALSE) |>
  formatCurrency("Total Flights", currency = "", digits = 0)
```

# Punctuality

## Row

### Col {.tabset}

```{r pt-arr-2025}
#| title: "Arrivals 2025"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(PHASE == "ARR", year == this_year) |>
  pivot_bands_long() |>
  arrange(region, ICAO)

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = ""),
         yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25),
         shapes = list(list(type = "line", x0 = 11.5, x1 = 11.5,
                            y0 = 0, y1 = 100,
                            line = list(color = "grey", dash = "dot"))))
```

```{r pt-dep-2025}
#| title: "Departures 2025"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(PHASE == "DEP", year == this_year) |>
  pivot_bands_long() |>
  arrange(region, ICAO)

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = ""),
         yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25),
         shapes = list(list(type = "line", x0 = 11.5, x1 = 11.5,
                            y0 = 0, y1 = 100,
                            line = list(color = "grey", dash = "dot"))))
```

```{r pt-arr-2024}
#| title: "Arrivals 2024"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(PHASE == "ARR", year == 2024) |>
  pivot_bands_long() |>
  arrange(region, ICAO)

plot_ly(d, x = ~label, y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = ""),
         yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.25))
```

### Col {width=35%}

```{r pt-scatter}
#| title: "% Within ±15 min – ARR vs DEP (2025)"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(year == this_year) |>
  select(ICAO, name, region, PHASE, within15) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = PHASE, values_from = within15) |>
  rename(Arrivals = ARR, Departures = DEP)

plot_ly(d, x = ~Arrivals, y = ~Departures, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "markers",
        text = ~paste0(ICAO, " – ", name),
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>ARR: %{x}%<br>DEP: %{y}%<extra></extra>",
        marker = list(size = 10)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "Arrivals within ±15 min (%)"),
         yaxis = list(title = "Departures within ±15 min (%)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

# Capacity

## Row

### Col {width=55%}

```{r cap-max}
#| title: "Declared Peak Capacity 2025 (flights/hour)"
d <- bli_pli |>
  filter(YEAR == this_year) |>
  arrange(MAX_CAP)

plot_ly(d, x = ~MAX_CAP, y = ~reorder(label, MAX_CAP),
        color = ~REG, colors = c(BRA = bra_col, EUR = eur_col),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{y}</b><br>%{x} flights/h<extra></extra>") |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "Flights / hour"),
         yaxis = list(title = ""),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.1),
         margin = list(l = 160))
```

### Col {width=45%}

```{r cap-bli}
#| title: "Busy-Level Index (BLI) – 2019–2025"
plot_ly(bli_pli, x = ~YEAR, y = ~BLI, color = ~REG,
        colors = c(BRA = bra_col, EUR = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label, opacity = 0.7,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: BLI = %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>",
        line = list(width = 1), marker = list(size = 4)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
         yaxis = list(title = "BLI (share of hours > 20% cap)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15))
```

## Row

```{r cap-pli}
#| title: "Peak-Level Index (PLI) – 2019–2025"
plot_ly(bli_pli, x = ~YEAR, y = ~PLI, color = ~REG,
        colors = c(BRA = bra_col, EUR = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label, opacity = 0.7,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: PLI = %{y:.4f}<extra></extra>",
        line = list(width = 1), marker = list(size = 4)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
         yaxis = list(title = "PLI (share of hours > 80% cap)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15))
```

# Taxi & ASMA

## Row {height=60%}

### Col {.tabset}

```{r tx-out}
#| title: "Taxi-Out (DEP)"
d <- txxt_annual |> filter(PHASE == "DEP")

plot_ly(d, x = ~year, y = ~avg_add, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:.2f} min<extra></extra>",
        line = list(width = 1.5), marker = list(size = 6)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
         yaxis = list(title = "Avg additional taxi-out (min)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15))
```

```{r tx-in}
#| title: "Taxi-In (ARR)"
d <- txxt_annual |> filter(PHASE == "ARR")

plot_ly(d, x = ~year, y = ~avg_add, color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        text = ~label,
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{text}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:.2f} min<extra></extra>",
        line = list(width = 1.5), marker = list(size = 6)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
         yaxis = list(title = "Avg additional taxi-in (min)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15))
```

```{r tx-asma}
#| title: "ASMA (Europe)"
plot_ly(asma_annual, x = ~year, y = ~avg_add_asma, color = ~label,
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{fullData.name}</b><br>%{x}: %{y:.2f} min<extra></extra>",
        line = list(width = 1.5), marker = list(size = 6)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "", dtick = 1),
         yaxis = list(title = "Avg additional ASMA (min)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

## Row {height=40%}

```{r tx-table}
#| title: "Additional Taxi Times – Summary"
txxt_annual |>
  select(Airport = label, Region = region, Year = year,
         Phase = PHASE, `Avg add. (min)` = avg_add) |>
  mutate(`Avg add. (min)` = round(`Avg add. (min)`, 2)) |>
  arrange(Region, Airport, Phase, Year) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 8, dom = "tip"), rownames = FALSE)
```

# BRA–EUR Flows

## Row

### Col {width=50%}

```{r fl-rank}
#| title: "Study Route Pair Rank Evolution (2023–2025)"
d <- flow_rank |>
  filter(PAIR_CLASS == "Study-Study")

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(YEAR), y = ~RANK, color = ~PAIR,
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines+markers",
        hovertemplate = "<b>%{fullData.name}</b><br>Year %{x} → Rank %{y}<extra></extra>",
        marker = list(size = 8)) |>
  layout(yaxis = list(title = "Rank (1 = busiest)", autorange = "reversed"),
         xaxis = list(title = ""),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

### Col {width=50%}

```{r fl-world}
#| title: "International Departures by World Region 2025"
plot_ly(world_reg, x = ~pct, y = ~reorder(ADES_WORLD_REGION, pct),
        color = ~region,
        colors = c(Brazil = bra_col, Europe = eur_col),
        type = "bar", orientation = "h",
        hovertemplate = "%{y}<br>%{x}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "group",
         xaxis = list(title = "Share of external departures (%)"),
         yaxis = list(title = ""),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.15))
```

# Airport Comparison

## Row {height=55%}

### Col {width=50%}

```{r cmp-sbgr}
#| title: "SBGR – Guarulhos · Arrival Punctuality"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(ICAO == "SBGR", PHASE == "ARR") |>
  pivot_bands_long()

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(year), y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
         yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

### Col {width=50%}

```{r cmp-lppt}
#| title: "LPPT – Humberto Delgado (Lisbon) · Arrival Punctuality"
d <- punc_annual |>
  filter(ICAO == "LPPT", PHASE == "ARR") |>
  pivot_bands_long()

plot_ly(d, x = ~factor(year), y = ~pct, color = ~band,
        colors = PUNCT_COLS, type = "bar",
        hovertemplate = "%{x}<br>%{y}%<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>") |>
  layout(barmode = "stack",
         xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
         yaxis = list(title = "%"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

## Row {height=45%}

```{r cmp-thru}
#| title: "Ordered Arrival Throughput – SBGR vs LPPT (2019–2025)"
d <- throughput |>
  mutate(airport = paste0(ICAO, ifelse(REG == "BRA",
    " – Guarulhos (BRA)", " – Lisbon (EUR)")))

plot_ly(d, x = ~RANK, y = ~TOT_THRU,
        color = ~airport,
        colors = c("SBGR – Guarulhos (BRA)" = bra_col,
                   "LPPT – Lisbon (EUR)"    = eur_col),
        linetype = ~factor(YEAR),
        type = "scatter", mode = "lines", opacity = 0.8,
        hovertemplate = "Rank %{x}<br>%{y} flights/h<extra>%{fullData.name}</extra>",
        line = list(width = 1.2)) |>
  layout(xaxis = list(title = "Rank (busiest hours first)"),
         yaxis = list(title = "Total throughput (flights/h)"),
         legend = list(orientation = "h", y = -0.2))
```

# Data

## Row {.tabset}

```{r dt-punc}
#| title: "Punctuality (annual)"
punc_annual |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = name, Region = region, Year = year, Phase = PHASE,
         `Early >15` = early_gt15, `Early 5–15` = early_5_15,
         `Within ±5` = within5, `Late 5–15` = late_5_15,
         `Late >15` = late_gt15, `Within ±15 (%)` = within15) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-traffic}
#| title: "Traffic (daily)"
traffic_daily |>
  select(Region = REG, Date = DATE, Year = year, Total = FLTS, Roll7d = roll7) |>
  mutate(Roll7d = round(Roll7d, 0)) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-capacity}
#| title: "Capacity / BLI / PLI"
bli_pli |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = name, Region = region, Year = YEAR,
         `Max Cap` = MAX_CAP, BLI, PLI) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE) |>
  formatRound(c("BLI","PLI"), digits = 4)
```

```{r dt-taxi}
#| title: "Taxi & ASMA"
txxt_annual |>
  select(ICAO, Airport = label, Region = region, Year = year,
         Phase = PHASE, `Avg add. (min)` = avg_add) |>
  mutate(`Avg add. (min)` = round(`Avg add. (min)`, 2)) |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-flows}
#| title: "BRA–EUR Route Pairs"
flow_rank |>
  datatable(filter = "top",
            options = list(pageLength = 12, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```

```{r dt-system}
#| title: "System Characterisation"
table_bra_eur |>
  datatable(options = list(pageLength = 10, scrollX = TRUE), rownames = FALSE)
```
